chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1590 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.5855/2025 (Condonation of delay) 2. For ordersCMA No.5856/2025 (Restoration) 14.01.2026 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< The petition was dismissed for non-prosecution on 03.09.2020. A restoration application along with an application under Section 5 of the Limitation Act was moved on 21.04.2025. It is submitted that the petitioner was unaware of the dismissal of the petition. However, that submission only shows that the petitioner was not interested in the matter as the delay in moving the restoration application is about 5 years. Since the petitioner does not show sufficient cause for condoning the delay CMA No.5855 of 2025 is dismissed, with the result that CMA No.5856 of 2025 for restoration of the petition also stands dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
